title: publish.json — a publishing unit's map (public/ origin tree)
description: Maps unit-relative sources to published URLs. DATA only — build logic lives in the unit's build.mjs, never here. Entry forms: "file" → "/exact/url", "dir/" → "/prefix/", "single-*-glob" → "/prefix/".

publish.description: source (unit-relative path, dir/ suffix, or single-* glob) → URL (must start with /; prefix targets end with /)
